steps.title: Use the earliest matching rocks
steps.content: The 4.02 bya Acasta rocks resemble modern plume-setting rocks, while the 3.75 bya and 3.6 bya rocks resemble modern subduction-setting rocks. The earliest evidence of subduction-like composition is therefore at about 3.75 bya.

steps.title: Avoid unsupported extensions
steps.content: B overgeneralizes and conflicts with the 4.02 bya plume evidence, C invents a majority claim, and D invents a revision to the rocks' ages. The supported conclusion is limited to subduction-like processes beginning no later than 3.75 bya. The answer is A.
